title: Events
tags: [Top Tips, Events]

# 🎤 Events

Tips for workshops, conferences, seminars, community events and hybrid participation.

---

## ✨ Community Tips

<div class="sticky-board">

  <div class="sticky-note yellow">
    <div class="note-title">🎧 Test audio remotely</div>
    <div class="note-text">
      Join the meeting as a remote participant before starting.
      Room audio often sounds completely different online.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sticky-note blue">
    <div class="note-title">🕐 Add transition time</div>
    <div class="note-text">
      People need space between sessions to move, reflect, and reset.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="sticky-note pink">
    <div class="note-title">📹 Visibility matters</div>
    <div class="note-text">
      If remote attendees are invisible, they naturally participate less.
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

---

## ✨ Share your experience

Got a useful tip, lesson learned, or idea? Add it below 👇

When you click **Add tip**, a GitHub page will open with your tip already filled in.  
Just press **Create issue** -that’s it! 🎉 

<div class="submit-box">

<form action="https://github.com/CAKE-DRI/CAKEbox/issues/new" method="get">

  <input name="title"
    placeholder="Short title of your tip"
    class="tip-input" />

  <textarea name="body"
    placeholder="Share your tip, experience or advice..."
    class="tip-textarea"></textarea>

  <input type="hidden" name="labels" value="top-tip,events" />

  <button type="submit" class="md-button md-button--primary">
    ✨ Add tip
  </button>

</form>

</div>
